title: Introduction to Machine Learning
description: Learn the basics of machine learning and neural networks

segments.text: Welcome to this introduction to machine learning
Today we will cover the basics of artificial intelligence
Machine learning is a subset of artificial intelligence
The key idea is that computers can learn from data
Neural networks are inspired by the human brain
Deep learning uses multiple layers of neural networks
Supervised learning uses labeled training data
Unsupervised learning finds patterns in unlabeled data
Reinforcement learning learns through trial and error
Classification assigns labels to input data
Clustering groups similar data points together
Natural language processing handles text and speech
Computer vision processes and understands images
Thanks for watching this introduction to machine learning
